description_long: This object is a compact, high-tech internet cafe setup featuring a large, U-shaped black desk with multiple computer monitors and gaming peripherals. The central area includes a gaming chair positioned in front of four large monitors, with two desktop towers placed on either side of the desk. The surface of the desk is illuminated by RGB LED lighting, which extends onto a matching floor mat with vibrant, multicolored stripes. Two large speakers are positioned at the corners of the desk, enhancing the immersive experience. The overall design is sleek and modern, optimized for gaming or collaborative digital activities.
description: A modern, U-shaped internet cafe station with multiple monitors, gaming chair, RGB lighting, and a vibrant striped floor mat.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full array of four monitors, gaming chair, two desktop towers, speakers, and the colorful LED-lit mat.
description_view_1: Angled rear-side view highlighting the back of the chair, the side of the desk, and the illuminated mat.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the monitors, the desk's structure, and the placement of the desktop towers.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the profile of the gaming chair, the side of the desk, and the RGB lighting on the mat.
attribute_computer_station_visibility: Four computer stations are clearly visible, arranged in a U-shape with monitors, towers, and a central gaming chair.
attribute_neon_lighting: RGB LED lighting is present along the desk edges and floor mat, displaying a spectrum of colors in a linear pattern.
